languages.text: "Бросайте молитвы — Император покинул вас, но я еще здесь. Исполните долг перед сво{mf|им|ей} спасител{mf|ем|ьницей} и добудьте оставшийся прометий".

traits.locale_text: "Бросайте молитвы — Император покинул вас, но я еще здесь. Исполните долг перед сво{mf|им|ей} спасител{mf|ем|ьницей} и добудьте оставшийся прометий".

languages.text: "Enough with the prayers. The Emperor abandoned you, but I am still here. Do your duty before your saviour and extract the remaining promethium."
languages.original_text: "Бросайте молитвы — Император покинул вас, но я еще здесь. Исполните долг перед сво{mf|им|ей} спасител{mf|ем|ьницей} и добудьте оставшийся прометий".

traits.locale_text: "Enough with the prayers. The Emperor abandoned you, but I am still here. Do your duty before your savior and extract the remaining promethium."
"Enough with the prayers. The Emperor abandoned you, but I am still here. Do your duty before your savior and extract the remaining promethium."
"Enough with the prayers. The Emperor abandoned you, but I am still here. Do your duty before your saviour and extract the remaining promethium."

languages.text: "Genug mit den Gebeten. Der Imperator hat euch im Stich gelassen, aber ich bin noch hier. Erfüllt eure Pflicht vor eurem Retter und holt das restliche Promethium."
languages.original_text: "Enough with the prayers. The Emperor abandoned you, but I am still here. Do your duty before your saviour and extract the remaining promethium."

languages.text: "Assez de prières. L'Empereur vous a abandonnés, mais je suis toujours là. Faites votre devoir devant votre sauveur et extrayez le prométhium restant."
languages.original_text: "Enough with the prayers. The Emperor abandoned you, but I am still here. Do your duty before your saviour and extract the remaining promethium."

languages.text: "别再祈祷了皇帝抛弃了你，但我还在这里。在你的救世主面前履行你的职责 提取剩余的钷元素"
languages.original_text: "Enough with the prayers. The Emperor abandoned you, but I am still here. Do your duty before your saviour and extract the remaining promethium."

languages.text: "Basta de oraciones. El Emperador te abandonó, pero yo sigo aquí. Cumple con tu deber ante tu salvador y extrae el prometio restante".
languages.original_text: "Enough with the prayers. The Emperor abandoned you, but I am still here. Do your duty before your saviour and extract the remaining promethium."

languages.text: 「祈りはもうたくさんだ。皇帝はあなたを見捨てたが、私はまだここにいる。救世主の前で義務を果たし、残りのプロメチウムを取り出すのだ"
languages.original_text: "Enough with the prayers. The Emperor abandoned you, but I am still here. Do your duty before your saviour and extract the remaining promethium."

languages.text: "Bu kadar dua yeter. İmparator sizi terk etti ama ben hâlâ buradayım. Kurtarıcınızın önünde görevinizi yapın ve kalan prometyumu çıkarın."
languages.original_text: "Enough with the prayers. The Emperor abandoned you, but I am still here. Do your duty before your saviour and extract the remaining promethium."
